# kSecAttrAccessControl

**Global Variable**

A key with a value that’s an access control instance indicating access control settings for the item.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrAccessControl: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecAccessControl] instance, created with the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecAccessControlCreateWithFlags(_:_:_:_:)] method, containing access control conditions for the item. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/restricting-keychain-item-accessibility] for more details.
title: kSecAttrAccessControl
